productDisplayName: Puma Men's Vibrant Black White Shoe
description: The Vibrant V range of shoes from puma are meant for a variety of indoor Sports and training. Made of superior quality material and a non-marking sole, these shoes look stylish and perform well. Upper Synthetic upper for durable protection Formstripe and cat logo on the sides for added style and comfort Appliqued cat logo on the tongue to create a fashion statement Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Mesh tongue for breathability Midsole EcoOrthoLite midsole for maximum comfort and support Removable sole insert OthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Outsole ArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off IdCELL technology to improve shock absorption and protect the feet EverTrack used in the outsole for enhanced durability in high-wear areas Non marking sole in multi-directional pattern for superior grip and traction
